entries.title: Release update - April 4, 2026
entries.summary: This release includes 3 improvements and 1 fix.
entries.markdown:
## Improvements
- **frontend**: Remove unused upload and data entry flows
- **repo**: Clean unused code and knip config
- **repo**: Deduplicate shared parsing and storage flows

## Fixes
- **auth**: Preserve login locale and dashboard redirect

commits.subject: fix(auth): preserve login locale and dashboard redirect
commits.author: symonbaikov

commits.subject: refactor(frontend): remove unused upload and data entry flows
commits.author: symonbaikov

commits.subject: refactor(repo): clean unused code and knip config
commits.author: symonbaikov

commits.subject: refactor(repo): deduplicate shared parsing and storage flows
commits.author: symonbaikov

entries.title: Release update - April 2, 2026
entries.summary: This release includes 1 feature and 4 fixes.
entries.markdown:
## Features
- **reports**: Localize balance exports and report flows

## Fixes
- **onboarding**: Persist locale in cookie & add table stats support
- **onboarding**: Fix locale
- **i18n**: Preserve selected locale across auth flows
- **frontend**: Polish statement and storage interactions

commits.subject: fix(onboarding): persist locale in cookie & add table stats support
commits.author: symonbaikov

commits.subject: fix(i18n): preserve selected locale across auth flows
commits.author: symonbaikov

commits.subject: feat(reports): localize balance exports and report flows
commits.author: symonbaikov

commits.subject: test(tours): refresh guided tours and selectors
commits.author: symonbaikov

commits.subject: fix(frontend): polish statement and storage interactions
commits.author: symonbaikov

entries.title: Release update - April 1, 2026
entries.summary: This release includes 8 fixes and 26 other updates.
entries.markdown:
## Fixes
- **docker**: Add dev stage to backend Dockerfile for devDependencies
- **docker**: Remove Task 3 dependencies from Dockerfile
- **docker**: Update docker-compose.dev.yml to target dev stage
- **seed**: Pre-compile seed scripts to avoid ts-node OOM
- **seed**: Use compiled scripts for all tools, fix local fallback
- **frontend**: Add serverExternalPackages for intlayer node:fs compat
- **seed**: Compile scripts locally before running in dev
- Login & register pages
